summary: God Mode Platform Dashboard (iteration 82) — Full backend and frontend testing. 29/29 backend tests pass. Found and fixed 2 bugs: (1) CRITICAL: real_tenants_map ReferenceError crashing Transactions section, (2) MEDIUM: Impersonation silently failing due to wrong API response key. All major spec items verified after fixes.

minor.issue: Stats API takes 10-15 seconds to respond from external URL (showing $0 on initial page load until resolved). Caching may need tuning.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: `real_tenants_map is not defined` ReferenceError caused full-page crash when clicking Transactions nav. Fixed by adding `const real_tenants_map = Object.fromEntries(churches.map(c => [c.tenant_id, c.name]))` in derived data section.
FIXED: Impersonation silently failed. API returns `token` key but frontend checked `d.session_token` (undefined). Fixed to use `d.token || d.session_token`.

Some rows show truncated tenant_id ('abundant-eas') instead of church name. real_tenants_map is derived from campus_breakdown; SolomonPay transactions may use slightly different tenant IDs than what appears in stats. Minor display issue, not a crash.
Abundant Church shows 'N/A' health score in both portfolio table and church cards while other 3 churches show C53. May need health score data for Abundant Church tenant.

integration_issues.issue: Stats API takes ~10-15s externally; KPIs show $0 on page load until API resolves. No loading skeleton shown — users see $0 initially, then data pops in.

issues: Hero KPIs display $0 for 10-15 seconds before real data loads. Consider adding a skeleton/loading state to KPI cards.

god_mode_spec_checklist.Sidebar has 8 nav items: PASS — Dashboard, Churches, Transactions, Payouts, Revenue, Donors, Reports, Settings
god_mode_spec_checklist.Church Portfolio Table: 4 church rows: PASS — Abundant Church, The Potter's House, City Reach Church, EdenX Ministries
god_mode_spec_checklist.Churches nav → church cards with health: PASS — 4 church cards with health badges
god_mode_spec_checklist.Reports nav → 9 report tabs: PASS — all 9 tabs: Giving, Attendance, Groups, Check-In, Cafe & Merch, Volunteers, Membership, Cross-Analysis, Audit Log

action_items: DONE: Fixed real_tenants_map ReferenceError in PlatformDashboard.jsx Transactions section
DONE: Fixed Impersonation handler to use d.token || d.session_token
OPTIONAL: Add loading skeleton to Hero KPI cards to show during 10-15s API load time
OPTIONAL: Fix transaction table CHURCH column for SolomonPay-generated transactions (tenant_id mismatch in real_tenants_map lookup)
OPTIONAL: Investigate why Abundant Church shows N/A health score while other churches show C53
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: real_tenants_map not defined in frontend (PlatformDashboard.jsx line ~751) — was a ReferenceError crash when Transactions section rendered. Added const definition from campus_breakdown.
FIXED: handleImpersonate was checking d.session_token but /api/platform/impersonate returns {token:..., user:..., impersonating:true}. Fixed to use d.token || d.session_token.

MINOR: Some transactions show truncated tenant_id instead of church name because real_tenants_map built from campus_breakdown may not include all tenant_id variants (e.g., SolomonPay vs regular transactions use different field values).
LOW: Stats API latency ~10-15s external — consider Redis caching or pre-computed aggregates for platform stats

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all spec items pass after 2 bug fixes; minor display issue in transactions CHURCH column)

mocked_apis: SolomonPay SimulationAdapter is MOCKED for payment processing
context_for_next_testing_agent: God Mode /platform route fully tested. 2 bugs found and fixed in PlatformDashboard.jsx: (1) real_tenants_map undefined crash in Transactions section (2) impersonate d.session_token→d.token fix. Platform admin session: sess_333250cd8c4641d0802f4676edd8e3d3. Stats API takes 10-15s to load — always wait 15s after navigation before checking KPIs. Backend 29/29 pass. Frontend all major spec items confirmed. Transactions table CHURCH column shows truncated tenant_id for some rows (minor) — not all transactions resolve through real_tenants_map. Church admin blocked from /api/platform/stats (403). No AppShell alongside God Mode sidebar confirmed.
